title: デビュー戦の後に・賑々しく狂おしき

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, did you see Yaeno Muteki?! Her
acceleration was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She was astounding! I bet she's gonna steal
the show at the Classics next year!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...So this is the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...
choice_data_list: Yaeno? Are you okay?
Yaeno? Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's expression is tight with
exhaustion as she returns to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She didn't seem particularly out of breath when
she crossed the finish line, so what could've
caused this?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm... ashamed of myself. I got swept up by the
excitement on the track.
choice_data_list: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The feverish energy from the stands affected me
a great deal...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As a result, I had to expend far more energy than
usual to keep my inner flame at bay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the heated atmosphere fanned her
competitive spirit and made it difficult to control,
thus causing a greater strain on her mind.
choice_data_list:
Make sure you rest up after getting home
today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right now, it's best to prioritize her recovery. I
tell her to take it easy and that we'll have a
meeting in place of training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Understood. My apologies for my lack of control.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, I take a stroll out to the
riverside, wondering the whole way over if Yaeno
Muteki has recovered yet.
Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm partially surprised to see her, I also had
a feeling she might be here. After all, I know just
how disciplined and harsh she is on herself.
choice_data_list: Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good morning, Trainer.
choice_data_list: How are you feeling? Not too sore?
How are you feeling? Not too sore?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. The burden on my mind has lifted as well.
My thoughts are clear once more.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Allow me to demonstrate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like there's anything to worry
about her physically, judging from how easily
she's doing her squats, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can sense some impatience from her, just from
the mere fact that she's doing regular exercises
and not practicing her katas.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.
choice_data_list: You seem agitated.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Nothing gets past you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My debut race yesterday... made me painfully
aware of my own ineptitude.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My mental fortitude is still lacking if it can be so
easily swayed by something like the crowd's
enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm satisfied with my performance during the race.
Thinking ahead, however...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I won't be able to fight on with how
easily I stray from the path of blaze fierce, water
still.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must train both my mind and body even further!
choice_data_list:
If that's the case, you should've just talked to
me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No. This is a matter that concerns only me. I
couldn't possibly bother you—
choice_data_list: I wouldn't think of it as a bother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that handling her intense competitive
drive is a given, as I'm already well aware of it,
and that I'm prepared to discuss and create a plan
to help train her mental strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Have you lost your wits?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...My apologies. Nobody has ever said such a
thing to me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I was young, teachers and other adults
alike gave up on me because they were so
appalled by my unruly behavior.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
I put up with it like you told me to! I held it in
even when I was mad! But they wouldn't stop
bugging me!

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text:
So I got angrier and angrier, and my head got all
hot and—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, you did hold your feelings in. Next time,
try to hold them in a little longer. Doing so will
strengthen your patience.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text: For that, you must train. Come, Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Despite my repeated failures, my grandfather
accepted me for who I was.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And whenever I felt dejected, my grandmother
would hold me close and cheer me on.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Though I have to say, I must have been a real
handful.
choice_data_list: Well, I want to keep moving forward with you.
Well, I want to keep moving forward with you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why would you go so far for me?
choice_data_list: Because I'm your trainer.
Because I'm your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bear the weight of supporting Yaeno Muteki
through three of the most important years in her
life. I tell her I'll never be content with merely
guiding her to victory.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It seems that I was the one who had
underestimated your duties as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You seem ready to go through any lengths for my
sake.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then... would you be willing to bear the weight of
my contrary nature, alongside everything else?
choice_data_list: That was always my intention.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...There's not a hint of hesitation in your eyes.
Your words are not born simply from a sense of
responsibility, but from the heart.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I shall put my faith in you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to renew my commitment to working
with you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I shall do my very best not to squander your good
will.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I don't wish to impose the same burden on you
that I did on my grandparents.
choice_data_list: You must be very grateful to them.
You must be very grateful to them.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very much so. The whole reason I want to do well
in the Twinkle Series is so I can show them how
much I've grown.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's not so much a repayment for their kindness,
but... it's more like an expression of my gratitude
for everything they've done for me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And to prove my growth, I must defeat mighty
opponents while keeping my competitive
impulses at bay.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I hope to face many a great adversary in the
Twinkle Series.
choice_data_list: Does that mean...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I wish to take on the Classic Triple Crown
tour.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is the tried-and-true path to greatness, so
there's bound to be incredible contenders. I wish
to train my mind and body through battle with
them.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But there is something I'm concerned about...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm unsure if I'll be able to maintain my form due
to my inexperience with the Triple Crown races...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right to be worried. The audience's energy
at her debut race was nothing like that of the
Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order for her to become acclimated to that
energy and successfully maintain her form, she'll
need to develop her race instincts...
choice_data_list: How about giving the Mainichi Hai a shot?
How about giving the Mainichi Hai a shot?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that the skill level of those competing at
the Mainichi Hai will make it a perfect prep race
for the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Joining that race would still allow us
ample time to deal with any issues which might
arise... Very well. I have no objections.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's take on the Mainichi Hai.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Now that I have a goal to work toward, I'm
keener than ever to train!
